title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot compete with AI on raw knowledge, and that curiosity and human judgment become the defining elements of intelligence in the age of AI. He uses Ramanujan's legacy to advocate for identifying undiscovered talent and rethinking what education should emphasize when knowledge is freely accessible.
